allow: PowerShell(powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; `$d = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.OpenFileDialog; `$d.Title = 'test'; `$d.ValidateNames = `$false; `$d.CheckFileExists = `$false; `$d.CheckPathExists = `$true; `$d.FileName = 'select'; if \(`$d.ShowDialog\(\) -eq 'OK'\) { [System.IO.Path]::GetDirectoryName\(`$d.FileName\) } else { '' }" 2>&1 | head -5)
